title: A super race, a super cause
summary: 4th Annual CASA Superhero 5K Run/Walk scheduled for Aug. 20 Get ready to channel your inner superhero. The 4th Annual CASA Superhero 5K Run/Walk is set for 11 a.m. Saturday, Aug. 20. The race begins and ends at the Tribal Courthouse in Old Town Kenai. “It’s a great time to have families get together...
